case_title: GAMEZ YOLANDA et al VS SANCHEZ ALVARO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ALVARO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ ALVARO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ALVARO $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SANCHEZ ALVARO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ALVARO
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22699, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ALVARO $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $215.00, REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA 22699 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SANCHEZ ALVARO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GAMEZ YOLANDA GAMEZ MARIA I. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
